role_picker_desc: Select your role to start a personalized guided tour
admin_desc: Manage buildings, expenses, users, and financials
owner_desc: View your apartment balance, payment history, and notifications
step_1_desc: This is your dashboard. See total income, expenses, overdue units, and managed buildings at a glance.
step_2_desc: Everything starts here. Click "+ Add Building" to enter the property address, floor count, and units.
step_3_desc: "Edit" to update building info. "View Apartments" to see each unit. "Assign Owner" to link an owner account to a specific unit. "View Expenses" to see the building's expense list. "Delete" removes the building while keeping records.
step_4_desc: Add any shared cost here: water, electricity, maintenance, and more. Choose the category, amount, and split type. Each unit's share is automatically rounded up to the nearest 5.
step_5_desc: "Edit" to change the amount or category. "Preview Split" to see each apartment's share before sending. "Delete" removes the expense and reverses any open balances.
step_6_desc: Create admin or owner accounts here. Admins have full access; owners see only their apartment data. "Deactivate" blocks login immediately without deleting records.
step_7_desc: The system includes 18 built-in categories in 5 groups. You can add custom categories to fit your building.
step_8_desc: Every action is automatically logged: who did it, what changed, and when. Use this page for financial compliance and dispute resolution.
step_o1_desc: This is your personal dashboard. See your current balance, recent payments, and any new expenses added to your apartment.
step_o2_desc: This is the list of expenses that include your apartment. You can see the total expense, your share after splitting, and payment status. Adding and editing expenses is admin-only.
step_o3_desc: Every payment the admin records for your apartment appears here in reverse chronological order: amount, method, date, and remaining balance. Click any row to download the receipt.
step_o4_desc: You receive three types of notifications: a reminder 3 days before payment is due, a confirmation when your payment is recorded, and a notice when a new expense is added.
step_o5_desc: Change your name, phone number, or password here. Email and role are managed by the admin.
